prestazioni: Engine swap to a G200W 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 (original engine code for Piazza Turbo/JR models) with a forged internals build: Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 2.5-inch center section and 4-inch tip exit for optimized spool and backpressure reduction.

Fuel system upgrade: Replace the stock fuel pump with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, paired with ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min) and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU for precise fuel mapping. Use a custom intercooler setup by GReddy (Type-S front-mount intercooler with 60mm core thickness) and a HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve to prevent compressor surge.

Suspension and drivetrain: Install a fully adjustable Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit (specific to the Piazza's unique double-wishbone front and multi-link rear suspension geometry) with 8kg/mm front and 7kg/mm rear springs. Replace the stock differential with a Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way LSD and upgrade to a set of 5x114.3 Enkei PF07 wheels (17x9 +35 front, 17x10 +40 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear).
estetica: Body kit: Install the rare and discontinued 'ISUZU Piazza JR Aero Kit' (originally produced by ISUZU in the late 1980s), featuring a deep front bumper with integrated fog lights, side skirts with JR badging, and a rear bumper with a diffuser-style lower section. Pair with a custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon (with a functional scoop for intercooler ducting) and a rear spoiler from the Piazza Turbo model (OEM part #8-94440-000-0).

Lighting: Replace the sealed-beam headlights with a set of custom HID projectors from Morimoto (XB35 HID bulbs in 5500K) housed in OEM-style Cibie buckets, paired with LED taillights from the Japanese-market Piazza Turbo (OEM part #8-94401-000-0). Add a set of JDM-spec yellow fog lights (OEM ISUZU part #8-94441-000-0) for a period-correct look.

Interior: Retrim the seats in black Alcantara with red stitching (using materials from Status Racing) and install a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter) on a NRG quick-release hub. Replace the stock gauge cluster with a Defi Advance BF series 5-gauge pod (oil pressure, oil temp, water temp, boost, and fuel pressure) and add a Bride Zeta III seat (specific to the Piazza's narrow cabin) with custom mounting brackets for proper fitment.
